Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Oh ! Well, I am most familiar with French cuisine, but I can try my hand at anything.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Except Whisperfrost ! Some Kweebecs insist that I should be well-versed in that ... that *slop* because of one notorious province and our supposed « similarity. »

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Am I meant to know what in Gaia's name un « timbit » is supposed to be ? And do not get me started on la farce that is poutine.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Ouf ! Even son nom sounds like one of their bizarre exclamations.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: And maple syrup !? Humans like you probably do not understand, as it is a delicacy for you too, but this is like drinking your own sang for us. They relish it !

Line.Text: Both his face and hands are clenched far tighter than they should be. He eventually notices this himself, and forces his body to relax against the back of his seat.
